sentence: 公司从各部门抽调了十名员工支援新项目。
pinyin: Gōngsī cóng gè bùmén chōudiào le shí míng yuángōng zhīyuán xīn xiàngmù.
english: The company transferred ten employees from various departments to support the new project.

sentence: 近年来建筑业发展得很快。
pinyin: Jìnnián lái jiànzhúyè fāzhǎn de hěn kuài.
english: The building industry has developed rapidly in recent years.

meaning: 1. did I ever ...? (or "did he ever ...?" etc)
sentence: 我何曾说过不同意？
pinyin: Wǒ hécéng shuōguò bù tóngyì?
english: When did I ever say I disagreed?

sentence: 她在晚会上唱了一首民谣。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎnhuì shang chàng le yī shǒu mínyáo.
english: She sang a folk song at the evening party.

sentence: 这幅画的色调非常温暖。
pinyin: Zhè fú huà de sèdiào fēicháng wēnnuǎn.
english: The hues of this painting are very warm.

sentence: 这个灯泡是二十瓦特的。
pinyin: Zhège dēngpào shì èrshí wǎtè de.
english: This light bulb is twenty watts.

meaning: 1. mold; 2. matrix; 3. pattern or die; 4. Taiwan pr. [mó jù]
sentence: 工厂订购了一批新模具。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng dìnggòu le yī pī xīn mújù.
english: The factory ordered a batch of new molds.

sentence: 他在一家汽车制造厂工作。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā qìchē zhìzàochǎng gōngzuò.
english: He works at a car manufacturing plant.

sentence: 爸爸每周末都在院子里除草。
pinyin: Bàba měi zhōumò dōu zài yuànzi lǐ chúcǎo.
english: Dad weeds the yard every weekend.

sentence: 南方今年夏天遭受了严重的洪灾。
pinyin: Nánfāng jīnnián xiàtiān zāoshòu le yánzhòng de hóngzāi.
english: The south suffered severe flooding this summer.

sentence: 这份文件可以作为他清白的佐证。
pinyin: Zhè fèn wénjiàn kěyǐ zuòwéi tā qīngbái de zuǒzhèng.
english: This document can serve as corroboration of his innocence.

sentence: 皮肤上的感受器能感知冷热。
pinyin: Pífū shang de gǎnshòuqì néng gǎnzhī lěng rè.
english: The sensory receptors in the skin can detect hot and cold.

sentence: 汉语和闽南语同属汉藏语族。
pinyin: Hànyǔ hé Mǐnnányǔ tóng shǔ Hàn-Zàng yǔzú.
english: Mandarin and Hokkien both belong to the Sino-Tibetan language branch.

sentence: 上级派人来督办这个项目，确保按时完成。
pinyin: Shàngjí pài rén lái dūbàn zhège xiàngmù, quèbǎo ànshí wánchéng.
english: The higher-ups sent someone to oversee the project and ensure it would be completed on time.

sentence: 他喜欢做短线投资，快进快出赚差价。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān zuò duǎnxiàn tóuzī, kuài jìn kuài chū zhuàn chājià.
english: He likes short-term investing, buying and selling quickly to profit from price differences.

sentence: 今年公司有盈余，员工都得到了年终奖。
pinyin: Jīnnián gōngsī yǒu yíngyú, yuángōng dōu dédào le niánzhōng jiǎng.
english: The company had a surplus this year, so all employees received a year-end bonus.

sentence: 寺庙里住着几位尼姑，每天诵经礼佛。
pinyin: Sìmiào lǐ zhùzhe jǐ wèi nígū, měitiān sòng jīng lǐ Fó.
english: Several Buddhist nuns live in the temple, chanting sutras and paying respects every day.

sentence: 有些地方的人喜欢冬天吃狗肉来暖身子。
pinyin: Yǒuxiē dìfang de rén xǐhuān dōngtiān chī gǒuròu lái nuǎn shēnzi.
english: People in some regions like to eat dog meat in winter to warm themselves up.

sentence: 他用拼音输入法打中文，速度越来越快了。
pinyin: Tā yòng pīnyīn shūrùfǎ dǎ Zhōngwén, sùdù yuèláiyuè kuài le.
english: He types Chinese using a pinyin input method, and his speed keeps getting faster.

sentence: 这篇论文通过大量考据证明了那段历史的真相。
pinyin: Zhè piān lùnwén tōngguò dàliàng kǎojù zhèngmíng le nà duàn lìshǐ de zhēnxiàng.
english: This paper used extensive textual research to establish the truth of that period of history.

meaning: (idiom) to achieve sth worthwhile; to make a positive contribution
sentence: 年轻人应该趁早努力，争取在事业上有所作为。
pinyin: Niánqīng rén yīnggāi chènzǎo nǔlì, zhēngqǔ zài shìyè shàng yǒu suǒ zuò wéi.
english: Young people should work hard early on and strive to achieve something meaningful in their careers.

sentence: 他说话总是一套官话，让人听不出真实想法。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà zǒng shì yī tào guānhuà, ràng rén tīng bu chū zhēnshí xiǎngfǎ.
english: He always speaks in bureaucratic language, making it hard to know what he really thinks.

meaning: to operate jointly; a joint venture; cooperative
sentence: 这家餐厅是两家公司合营的，生意很好。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng shì liǎng jiā gōngsī héyíng de, shēngyi hěn hǎo.
english: This restaurant is a joint venture between two companies and is doing very well.

sentence: 我们一家去海边度假村住了三天，玩得很开心。
pinyin: Wǒmen yījiā qù hǎibiān dùjiàcūn zhù le sān tiān, wán de hěn kāixīn.
english: Our family stayed at a seaside resort for three days and had a great time.

sentence: 两国达成协议后，驻扎在边境的部队开始撤军。
pinyin: Liǎng guó dáchéng xiéyì hòu, zhùzhā zài biānjìng de bùduì kāishǐ chèjūn.
english: After the two countries reached an agreement, troops stationed at the border began to withdraw.

sentence: 我去银行支行办理了开户手续，很顺利。
pinyin: Wǒ qù yínháng zhīxíng bànlǐ le kāihù shǒuxù, hěn shùnlì.
english: I went to a bank branch to open an account, and it went smoothly.

meaning: to come down with; to be afflicted with (an illness)
sentence: 他因为长期熬夜，患上了严重的胃病。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi chángqī áoyè, huànshàng le yánzhòng de wèibìng.
english: Because he stayed up late for a long time, he came down with a serious stomach illness.

meaning: (mahjong) to self-draw the winning tile; (slang) to play with oneself;
sentence: 他打麻将很顺，连续两局都自摸赢了。
pinyin: Tā dǎ májiàng hěn shùn, liánxù liǎng jú dōu zìmō yíng le.
english: He was on a roll in mahjong, winning two games in a row by self-drawing the winning tile.

sentence: 检方提出了充分的证据，法官采信了他们的说法。
pinyin: Jiǎnfāng tíchū le chōngfèn de zhèngjù, fǎguān cǎixìn le tāmen de shuōfǎ.
english: The prosecution presented sufficient evidence, and the judge accepted their account.

sentence: 公司的年报显示，去年营业额增长了百分之二十。
pinyin: Gōngsī de niánbào xiǎnshì, qùnián yíngyè'é zēngzhǎng le bǎifēnzhī èrshí.
english: The company's annual report shows that revenue grew by twenty percent last year.

sentence: 这条公路禁止重载卡车通行，以保护路面。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo gōnglù jìnzhǐ zhòngzài kǎchē tōngxíng, yǐ bǎohù lùmiàn.
english: This road prohibits heavy-load trucks to protect the road surface.

sentence: 房价由供需关系决定，需求大时价格就会上涨。
pinyin: Fángjià yóu gōngxū guānxi juédìng, xūqiú dà shí jiàgé jiù huì shàngzhǎng.
english: Housing prices are determined by supply and demand — when demand is high, prices rise.

meaning: live pig; pig on the hoof
sentence: 市场上生猪的价格最近波动很大。
pinyin: Shìchǎng shàng shēngzhū de jiàgé zuìjìn bōdòng hěn dà.
english: The price of live pigs on the market has been fluctuating a lot recently.

sentence: 她是当红的小花，出道两年就拿了最佳新人奖。
pinyin: Tā shì dānghóng de xiǎohuā, chūdào liǎng nián jiù ná le zuìjiā xīnrén jiǎng.
english: She is a hot young actress who won the Best Newcomer award just two years after her debut.

meaning: building under construction; commercial property; real estate (for sal
sentence: 这个楼盘的位置不错，离地铁站只有五分钟。
pinyin: Zhège lóupán de wèizhi búcuò, lí dìtiě zhàn zhǐyǒu wǔ fēnzhōng.
english: This property development is well located — only five minutes from the subway station.

sentence: 她最近迷上了一部悬疑网剧，每天追更。
pinyin: Tā zuìjìn míshàng le yī bù xuányí wǎngjù, měitiān zhuī gēng.
english: She has recently become hooked on a suspense web series and follows it every day.

sentence: 他在一家大公司的人力资源部门工作了五年。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā dà gōngsī de rénlì zīyuán bùmén gōngzuò le wǔ nián.
english: He has worked in the human resources department of a large company for five years.

sentence: 这篇文章有不少创见，读起来很有启发。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng yǒu bùshǎo chuàngjiàn, dú qǐlái hěn yǒu qǐfā.
english: This article contains quite a few original ideas and is very thought-provoking to read.

sentence: 能有这么好的家人，真是福气。
pinyin: Néng yǒu zhème hǎo de jiārén, zhēn shì fúqì.
english: Having such wonderful family members is truly a blessing.

sentence: 他迟疑了一下，才开口说话。
pinyin: Tā chí yí le yī xià, cái kāi kǒu shuō huà.
english: He hesitated for a moment before speaking.

sentence: 地质队员在山里勘探矿产资源。
pinyin: Dìzhì duìyuán zài shān lǐ kāntàn kuàngchǎn zīyuán.
english: Geological survey teams prospect for mineral resources in the mountains.

sentence: 他获得了游泳项目的银牌。
pinyin: Tā huòdé le yóuyǒng xiàngmù de yínpái.
english: He won a silver medal in the swimming event.

sentence: 他在家和在公司的态度反差很大。
pinyin: Tā zài jiā hé zài gōngsī de tàidu fǎnchà hěn dà.
english: There is a big contrast between how he acts at home and at work.

sentence: 他有一个嗜好，就是收集各种旧钱币。
pinyin: Tā yǒu yí gè shìhào, jiùshì shōují gèzhǒng jiù qiánbì.
english: He has a hobby of collecting all kinds of old coins.

sentence: 我们计划在三月上旬出发旅游。
pinyin: Wǒmen jìhuà zài sānyuè shàng xún chūfā lǚyóu.
english: We plan to set off on our trip in the first ten days of March.

sentence: 这次运动会的吉祥物是一只小熊猫。
pinyin: Zhè cì yùndònghuì de jíxiángwù shì yī zhī xiǎo xióngmāo.
english: The mascot for this sports meet is a little red panda.

meaning: 1. to occupy by force; 2. to seize; 3. to dominate
sentence: 他把共用的桌子霸占了一整天。
pinyin: Tā bǎ gòngyòng de zhuōzi bāzhàn le yī zhěng tiān.
english: He monopolized the shared table for an entire day.

sentence: 山里的泉水可以直接当饮用水。
pinyin: Shān lǐ de quánshuǐ kěyǐ zhíjiē dāng yǐnyòng shuǐ.
english: The spring water in the mountains can be used directly as drinking water.

sentence: 这袋大米重五千克，搬起来有点费力。
pinyin: Zhè dài dàmǐ zhòng wǔ qiānkè, bān qǐlái yǒudiǎn fèilì.
english: This bag of rice weighs five kilograms and takes some effort to carry.

sentence: 均衡的膳食对健康很重要。
pinyin: Jūn héng de shàn shí duì jiàn kāng hěn zhòng yào.
english: A balanced diet is very important for good health.
